promise_text: Free bus travel for women in state-run urban and suburban buses
notes: Repeatedly identified as a flagship fulfilled promise.

promise_text: Reduce Aavin milk prices
notes: South First identifies the Rs 3 per litre reduction as implemented.

promise_text: Rs 1000 monthly assistance for eligible women heads of households
notes: Implemented through Kalaignar Magalir Urimai Thogai though rollout timing matters.

promise_text: Reduce petrol by Rs 5 and diesel by Rs 4
notes: South First reports only Rs 3 petrol and Rs 2 diesel cuts.

promise_text: Reduce LPG cylinder price / give LPG subsidy
notes: South First identifies LPG subsidy / price reduction as not implemented.

promise_text: Student education loan waiver for eligible youth
notes: Both South First pieces identify this as unfulfilled / stalled.

promise_text: 75 percent reservation for Tamil Nadu residents in private sector employment
notes: Described as aspirational / not materialised.

promise_text: Allocate Rs 1000 crore for temple renovation
notes: Reported as allocated and acted upon; expenditure closure not independently audited here.

promise_text: Live-stream Assembly proceedings for transparency
notes: South First notes live-streaming exists but opposition speeches are cut.

promise_text: Increase financial assistance under marriage assistance schemes
notes: South First cites promises 255 to 259 as largely not implemented.

promise_text: Government jobs for unmarried women above age 35 based on qualification
notes: Explicitly identified by South First as unfulfilled promise 262.

promise_text: Do not increase property tax until Covid effects subside
notes: South First says property tax was raised in 2022 despite promise 487.

promise_text: Withdraw cases against Sterlite hydrocarbon methane Kudankulam protesters
notes: South First says several cases remain pending and fresh cases were filed.

promise_text: Waive outstanding crop loans through cooperatives
notes: Immediate post-oath action and later litigation/reporting confirm implementation.

promise_text: Provide 100 free units of electricity every two months
notes: News18 cites immediate order and later subsidy support.

promise_text: 50 percent subsidy up to Rs 20000 for working women to buy scooters
notes: News18 reports order was passed soon after assuming office.

promise_text: Increase maternity assistance from Rs 12000 to Rs 18000
notes: News18 explicitly identifies this as fulfilled.

promise_text: Construct 5000 houses for fishermen
notes: Reported by News18 as fulfilled; second corroborating source not captured in this research pass.

promise_text: Free laptops for students
notes: Reported by News18 as fulfilled; second corroborating source not captured in this research pass.

promise_text: Free cell phones for ration card holders
notes: Both status-check articles identify this as remaining on paper.

promise_text: Free Wi-Fi in public places
notes: Only limited Amma Free Wi-Fi zones were launched in five cities.

promise_text: Amma banking card for the poor to avail state services
notes: Both status-check articles say it had not reached the ground.

promise_text: Phased prohibition and closure of TASMAC shops
notes: 500 shops closed and numbers reduced but prohibition not fully implemented.

promise_text: Protected agricultural zone / no methane shale gas projects in delta
notes: Protected agricultural zone declared but TNM notes unresolved questions for ongoing projects.

promise_text: Increase Mullaiperiyar dam level to 152 feet
notes: TNM explicitly marks this not fulfilled.

promise_text: Cauvery Water Management Board / authority implementation
notes: TNM marks fulfilled after Union notification of authority in 2018.

promise_text: Prevent Karnataka from constructing Mekedatu dam
notes: Fulfilled in the limited sense used by TNM: no environmental clearance as of report date.

promise_text: Athikadavu-Avinashi project
notes: TNM uses 'project launched' rather than fulfilled.

promise_text: Elevated highway from Meenambakkam to Chengalpattu
notes: TNM explicitly marks not fulfilled.

promise_text: Monorail in Chennai Madurai Trichy and Coimbatore
notes: TNM explicitly marks partially fulfilled.

promise_text: Stormwater drains in GCC limits
notes: TNM uses 'project underway' rather than fulfilled.

promise_text: Metro extension to Airport and Washermanpet to Wimco Nagar
notes: TNM explicitly marks fulfilled.

promise_text: Rs 4000 Covid cash relief for ration card holders
notes: Described as a first-wave fulfilled assurance after taking office.

promise_text: Increase reservation for women in government jobs from 30 percent to 40 percent
notes: South First lists this as implemented under women welfare.

promise_text: Extend maternity leave for women employees from 9 months to 12 months
notes: Reported as implemented through legal provision.

promise_text: Set up working women hostels in all districts
notes: Reported as implemented by South First.

promise_text: Reserve 100 percent of government and public sector jobs for Tamil Nadu youth
notes: Identified as promise 495 and not materialised.

promise_text: Regularise part-time art music and physical education teachers
notes: Identified as promise 181 and pending.

promise_text: Implement old pension scheme for transport workers
notes: Reported as not implemented including non-extension of TAPS to transport workers.

promise_text: Establish Semmozhi Poongas in all municipal corporations
notes: Only Coimbatore cited as delivered during the term.

promise_text: Revive the Legislative Council
notes: Listed among unfulfilled institutional reform commitments.

promise_text: Provide monthly assistance to Jallikattu participants
notes: Mentioned in unfulfilled list but requires stronger secondary corroboration.

promise_text: Link Cauvery Vaigai Mahanadhi Godavari Krishna and Gundaru rivers
notes: TNM marks this as project launched with foundation stone in 2021.

promise_text: Implement Pamba Achankovil Vaipaaru river linking project
notes: TNM marks this promise as not fulfilled.

promise_text: Convert Cuddalore harbour into a deep sea harbour
notes: TNM reports Union nod and CRZ clearance but not full commissioning.
